title: New requirement to create connections for Salesforce ingestion
body:
In early September 2025, Salesforce began restricting the use of uninstalled connected apps. This restriction does not break existing Unity Catalog connections to Salesforce, but it prevents you from creating a connection to a new Salesforce instance without the Databricks connected app installed.

For background, see [Prepare for Connected App Usage Restrictions Change](https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=005132365&type=1) in the Salesforce documentation.

For steps to connect to Salesforce, see [Create a Salesforce connection](/aws/en/ingestion/lakeflow-connect/salesforce-connection)

ref_links.text: Prepare for Connected App Usage Restrictions Change
